name: LL — Read Config Pattern (paste nodes into any workflow)

nodes.name: Read Client_Master_Config
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace YOUR_MASTER_CONFIG_SHEET_ID with the actual document ID of your master config sheet. Replace credential ID.

nodes.name: Loop: Process Each Client
nodes.notes: Output 0 (loop) connects to the first node of your workflow logic (e.g. Get OAuth Credentials). Output 1 (done) connects to a summary node or leave empty to terminate.

nodes.name: Merge Config + Token
nodes.notes: PLACEMENT: Connect output of 'Process & Store Fresh Token' → this node → first QB API call node. After this node, all QB API URLs and Slack channels can use expressions like ={{ $('Merge Config + Token').first().json.qb_realm_id }}

meta.notes: INSTRUCTIONS: 1) Import this workflow. 2) Select all 4 nodes and copy them. 3) Open your target workflow and paste. 4) Replace YOUR_MASTER_CONFIG_SHEET_ID and credential ID in 'Read Client_Master_Config'. 5) Connect your Schedule Trigger → Read Client_Master_Config. 6) Connect Loop output 0 → your existing first node (e.g. Get OAuth Credentials). 7) Connect 'Process & Store Fresh Token' → Merge Config + Token → your first QB API call. 8) In all QB API nodes, replace hardcoded realm IDs and URLs with expressions referencing Merge Config + Token.
